arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN IN DOHA: Often it was a shiny new speedboat, or some other distant treasure. 'Look at what you could have won,' host Jim Bowen would declare from behind jam-jar lenses.

arts.ttl: Manchester United have ‘increased their attention’ on possible Casemiro replacement – Red Devils have total approval for move
arts.sum: Over the past few months, Manchester United has repeatedly been reported as a potential destination for Atalanta midfielder Ederson. While the likes of Manchester City and Newcastle United have also been mentioned as interested parties, there is now an update about Manchester United’s interest in the Brazilian midfielder. This comes from Tuttomercatoweb, who report today The post Manchester United have ‘increased their attention’ on possible Casemiro replacement – Red Devils have total approval for move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer update: Manchester United price revealed as Ruben Amorim prepares for January exit
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly set an asking price for Marcus Rashford ahead of the January transfer window, with Ruben Amorim hoping to make additions to his squad.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star dishes out hot meals to homeless people on Christmas Eve
arts.sum: Manchester United's Portuguese defender, 25, has lived in the city for six years since his big-money move from Porto as a teenager and made the unannounced visit to help at Lifeshare on Christmas Eve

arts.ttl: Man United and Ruben Amorim need one Sir Jim Ratcliffe guarantee after harsh criticism
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news and opinion as the new United boss has already come under some criticism following the weekend's 3-0 home defeat against Bournemouth.
